name: fullstack-orchestrator
description: Local-first full-stack product discovery, context continuity, collaboration, and release orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Keep full-stack product work coherent through release.
interface.longDescription: Discover a service, create or adopt its durable project harness, coordinate Git workspaces and contracts, preserve context, and verify one release candidate.
defaultPrompt: Start a new full-stack service with me.
Audit the project context and tell me what is next.
